core_principles: Clarity over Decoration: For the Kiosk, if it doesn't help the user pay, remove it.
Touch-First Physics: Buttons must feel 'pressable'. Use active states aggressively.
The 'Dutch' Cleanliness: Minimalist, bold, organized, efficient.
Trust through Consistency: The Admin dashboard and Kiosk must feel like the same ecosystem.

typography.instructions: Use Manrope for all headings to give a modern, friendly character. Use Inter for all input fields and tables for maximum legibility. Use JetBrains Mono exclusively for the Receipt component.

primary.description: Deep Royal Blue - Trust, Authority, Corporate

secondary.description: Dutch Orange - High Visibility, Action, Warmth (Use for 'Pay Now' buttons)

usage_rules: KIOSK: Use Orange (#f97316) for the PRIMARY action (Next, Pay). Use Blue (#1e3a8a) for branding headers.
ADMIN: Use Blue (#1e3a8a) for the Sidebar and Primary Buttons. Use subtle grays for backgrounds.
NEVER use gradients for text. Keep contrast high (WCAG AA).

layout.spacing_system: Use generous padding for Kiosk mode (p-8, p-12). Use dense padding for Admin mode (p-4).

grid_system.kiosk: Single column centered layout. Max-width 600px for forms.
grid_system.admin: Sidebar navigation (fixed left) + Fluid content area. Dashboard grid: 12 columns.

kiosk_mode_specifics.touch_targets: All interactive elements must be min-height 60px.
kiosk_mode_specifics.placement: Primary actions at the bottom of the screen (thumb zone).
kiosk_mode_specifics.wizard_pattern: One question per screen. 'Back' button always visible top-left.

variants.kiosk_primary: h-16 text-xl bg-secondary hover:bg-secondary/90 text-white shadow-md
variants.kiosk_secondary: h-16 text-xl bg-white border-2 border-border hover:bg-accent text-foreground

overrides.styles: h-14 text-lg px-4 rounded-lg border-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-0 focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary focus-visible:border-primary

custom_components.name: KioskKeypad
custom_components.description: On-screen numeric keypad for apartment number entry if no physical keyboard.

custom_components.name: ReceiptTicket
custom_components.description: Thermal printer compatible component. Hidden on screen, visible on print.
custom_components.css_rules: @media print { @page { size: 80mm auto; margin: 0; } body { visibility: hidden; } .receipt-only { visibility: visible; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; width: 100%; } }

custom_components.name: TuyaBreakerPanel
custom_components.description: Mock interface for switching breakers. Toggle switches with status indicators.

images.description: Modern apartment building exterior (Use with overlay for Kiosk Welcome Screen)
Hand holding keys - Symbolizing successful payment/tenant status

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all icons. Kiosk icons should be large (w-12 h-12).

motion.transitions: All buttons: transition-transform duration-100 ease-in-out (for touch feedback).
motion.page_transition: Kiosk steps should slide in from right to left.

universal_guidelines.testing: All interactive elements must have 'data-testid' attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Ensure Tailwind config includes the custom colors (Dutch Orange, Deep Blue).
2. KIOSK: Create a separate layout 'KioskLayout' that removes all admin sidebars/headers and focuses on full-screen immersion.
3. RECEIPT: Implement the 'ReceiptTicket' component with the specific print CSS. When 'Print' is clicked, trigger window.print().
4. LANGUAGE: All user-facing text must be in DUTCH (Nederlands).
5. MOCK: The Tuya Breaker Control is a UI-only mock. Use state to toggle switches but no backend logic needed yet.
